passages.passage_text: The following are the conditions for selecting a Manager for a reputed public sector company. The candidate must: a) be a post-graduate in commerce with 60% marks or a C.A. b) not be more than 25 years old and less than 20 years old. c) have fluency in English and Hindi. d) be in a position to pay Rs. 10,000/- as deposit to the company. e) give an undertaking to work for at least 5 years for the company. However, (i) If a person satisfies all the conditions except (a) above, he should be referred to the Managing Director of the company. (ii) If a person satisfies all the conditions except (d) above, he should be referred to the Chairman of the company. On the basis of the above criteria and the information provided, you have to decide each case. You are not to assume anything which is not given in the questions. The alternative courses of decision are indicated in the same area as follows. Mark answer: 1) If data provided is not complete in the case of any of the candidate 2) If the candidate cannot be selected as a Management Trainee. 3) If the candidate can be selected as a Management Trainee. 4) If the candidate is to be referred to the Managing Director. 5) If the candidate is to be referred to the Chairman.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Subodh Kelkar has secured 85% marks in both Higher Secondary Graduation. His date of birth is 15th March, 1960. He has obtained a scholarship. The total income of his family is Rs.21,500. He has not given any other scholarship. The total income of his family is Rs.21,500. He has filed following information and is asking for the questions given below it.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: 25-year-old Fahad is Post-Graduate in commerce with 60% marks like us in Hindi only. He can pay the required deposit and is also ready to give 3 years' undertaking.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: 21-year-old Vijay has obtained 63% marks in Post-Graduate in Commerce, is fluent in Hindi and English and can pay the required deposit. He is willing to give 5 years' undertaking.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: 27-year-old Suresh is a C.A. with fluency in Hindi and English. He can pay Rs. 8,000 as deposit and will give 5 years' undertaking.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Amar is a Post Graduate with 59% marks in Commerce. He is fluent in Hindi and English and also willing to give an undertaking of 5 years but cannot pay the required deposit.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Rajan is a Post-Graduate in Commerce with 70% marks. He is fluent in Hindi and English. He can pay the required deposit and is ready to give 5 years' undertaking. His date of birth is 01.11.1973.
